title: lantana urticoides f. macrophylla
intro: Lantana urticoides f. macrophylla, also known as Big Lantana, is a flowering plant species in the verbena family that is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lantana urticoides f. macrophylla include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
